violations.description: Filter elements use <div> instead of <button> for interactive controls. Divs are not focusable via keyboard and have no implicit button role, making them inaccessible to keyboard and screen reader users.
violations.reference_fix:
<button class="filter-btn active">All</button>
<button class="filter-btn">Italian</button>
<button class="filter-btn">Japanese</button>
<button class="filter-btn">Mexican</button>
<button class="filter-btn">Indian</button>

page_description: A restaurant search page with category filters. The filter controls are <div> elements styled as buttons but lack proper button semantics and keyboard accessibility.
